text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Wow! What's everyone laughing at? Did something funny happen?!
Tell me!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Nothing really happened in particular... But, you know how both El
and Opera O performed a solo during the concert?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Well, they started a debate over who should be considered the star
of the show, and then King Halo and our class representative got
involved...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: And this is... how it ended?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
...Status—"Perplexed". No connection can be found between
simultaneous laughter and the process leading to dispute resolution.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I agree. They've been at this for about fifteen minutes already. I
expect that any moment now they'll realize...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: For us, there's a more fitting way to settle the score...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Hmph. It seems we are left with no other options.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: That's right! It's time our legs do the talkin'!

text_block_list.name: Everyone
text_block_list.text: Let's settle this in a race!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Heh, everyone's so full of energy.
